scripts.setup: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p=require('path'); const sEnv=p.join('server','.env'); const sEx=p.join('server','.env.example'); if(!fs.existsSync(sEnv)&&fs.existsSync(sEx)) fs.copyFileSync(sEx,sEnv); const cEnv=p.join('client','.env'); const cEx=p.join('client','.env.example'); if(!fs.existsSync(cEnv)&&fs.existsSync(cEx)) fs.copyFileSync(cEx,cEnv);"
scripts.dev: concurrently -n SERVER,CLIENT -c magenta,cyan "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.lint: npm --prefix server run lint && npm --prefix client run lint
